ai-labs/anthropic.summary: Jun 5 2026: Anthropic CEO co-signed joint biosecurity letter to US Congress with OpenAI, Google DeepMind, Microsoft calling for mandatory synthetic DNA screening. Anthropic also published separate paper proposing coordinated global AI development pause mechanism. Background: RSP v3.0 (Feb 2026) removed hard deployment limits, replaced with dual-condition pause trigger — described by critics as downgrade. EU AI Act high-risk guidelines consultation closes Jun 23 2026.

ai-labs/openai.summary: MAJOR (Jun 12-14 2026): 42-state attorney general coalition opened formal investigation into OpenAI; NY AG Letitia James served subpoena Jun 12. Covers advertising, user engagement, model sycophancy, consumer/health data handling, treatment of minors/seniors. OpenAI filed confidential S-1 with SEC Jun 8 (near-$1T IPO valuation). 42-state subpoena arrived 4 days after S-1. Also Jun 5: co-signed biosecurity letter to Congress with Anthropic/Google/Microsoft.
